steps.title: Write the mean
steps.content:
The known values have sum $84$. For any value of $x$, the mean is
$$\frac{84+x}{5}$$

steps.title: Test the smallest choice
steps.content:
If $x=11$, the ordered list is $11,19,20,22,23$, so the median is $20$. The mean is
$$\frac{84+11}{5}=19$$

steps.title: Compare mean and median
steps.content: For $x=11$, the mean and median are not equal, so this value is not possible. The other listed values produce equal mean and median values. The answer is A.
